steps.title: Match the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants a detailed overview of the structures at Keet Seel. The relevant notes are the natural cliff alcove, the multistory adobe and stone buildings, the cube-shaped contiguous rooms, and the round kivas used for ceremonial purposes and gathering. A strong answer should focus on physical features, not only location, builders, or dates.

steps.title: Remove partial options
steps.content: Choice A mentions kivas and location but leaves out the adobe and stone construction, the multistory buildings, and the cube-shaped rooms. Choice B focuses on Ancestral Puebloan builders and the dates of habitation. Choice D gives only the builders, materials, and location, so it is too thin for a detailed structural overview.

steps.title: Select the full overview
steps.content: The remaining choice combines the cliff alcove setting with multistory adobe and stone buildings, round kivas, and surrounding cube-shaped contiguous rooms. That uses the notes that describe Keet Seel's structures most completely and directly addresses the student's goal. The answer is C.
